title: Quota exceeded error for Google Gemini API on free tier
symptom: When attempting to use the Gemini 3.1 Pro model, n8n returns a 'Quota exceeded' error despite sending only a single request.
not_this_if: Using a different model available on the free tier
root_cause: The free tier of the Google Gemini API does not provide access to the Gemini 3.1 Pro model. Users on the free tier are limited to lower-tier models, and attempting to use a higher-tier model results in a quota exceeded error.
fix_steps: Enable billing on your Google account
Update the API key in n8n
Retry the request with the Gemini 3.1 Pro model
agent_instruction: Enable billing and obtain a paid API key to access the Gemini 3.1 Pro model.
